rows.description: Recepta varia
rows.notes: Consensus across all extractors for all fields.

rows.description: 1788 Nov. 4th Mr. William Harriotts Plate Money
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description chosen from gemini-flash, which matches the image ('Nov.' and 'Money') more accurately than gpt-5-mini's ('Novr.' and 'money').

rows.description: Mr. Bawden's do
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description 'Mr. Bawden's do' selected from gemini-flash, as 'Bawden's' is a more accurate visual reading than 'Bowden's' (gpt-5-mini).

rows.description: Dec. 6. of the Revd. Mr. Cooke Dr. Hoptondge's Benefaction
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description constructed by visual verification: 'Dec. 6.' from gpt-5-mini is correct, while 'Hoptondge's Benefaction' from gemini-flash is correct. gemini-flash incorrectly read the date as 'Sept. 6.'.

rows.description: 31 Increment due at Midsr. last from The Bursar
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's amounts, including the clear '½' pence fraction. gpt-5-mini's note revealed uncertainty about the fraction and incorrectly dismissed it. gemini-flash's description is also more accurate, not including a 'Dec.' prefix seen in gpt-5-mini's version.

rows.description: 1789 Jan. 31. of Mr. Bowles Esq. Lyon Rent for H. Hokenham
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description chosen from gemini-flash, which accurately transcribes the full date and details 'Lyon Rent for H. Hokenham'. gpt-5-mini missed the date and misread parts of the description.

rows.description: Feb. 24. Hon. Geo. King & Hon. John Engs's Plate Money
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description chosen from gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini incorrectly extracted the date from the previous row and misread names ('Mrs. Jane Engs').

rows.description: Mar. 27. Mr. John Harriott's Plate Money
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description chosen from gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini incorrectly extracted the date from a previous row ('Feb. 24').

rows.description: June 3. of Mr. Cooke D. Hoptondge's Benefact. 2d. Payment
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description derived from gemini-flash (correct date and 'Hoptondge's Benefact.') with an addition from visual verification ('2d. Payment'). gpt-5-mini was largely incorrect on date and beneficiary.

rows.description: 11. of Mr. Parsons Lyon of Symes Exhibit. at Maidwell.
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description chosen from gemini-flash, which provides a much more accurate transcription of the detailed text compared to gpt-5-mini's speculative reading.

rows.description: of Mr. Bowles 2d. Payment for H. Hokenham
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description constructed by visual verification, using '2d. Payment' from gpt-5-mini and 'for H. Hokenham' (consistent with previous entries) instead of 'A. Wittenham'.

rows.description: 29 of Mr. Demainbray Dean's Treas. H. S. & House
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description chosen from gemini-flash, which accurately transcribes 'Treas. H. S. & House' compared to gpt-5-mini's 'Fees to House'.

rows.description: July 1. of Mr. Vivian Bursr. Increm. to Midsr. 1789
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts and fraction. Description chosen from gemini-flash for its slightly more accurate transcription of 'Bursr.' and 'Midsr.'.

rows.description: A Quarter Part of Mr. Donnithorne's Fine for St. Lane
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description chosen from gemini-flash, which provides a more accurate transcription of 'Donnithorne's Fine for St. Lane' compared to gpt-5-mini's 'Donithorne's Time for had lane'.

rows.description: Mr. Samands Bursr. Increm. for James 1788
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's amounts and interpretation of the fraction as ¾ pence. gpt-5-mini interpreted it as ½ pence. gemini-flash's description is also more accurate.

rows.description: Oct. 30. of Gibbons, Fenwick, for old Iron as by Acct.
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description chosen from gemini-flash, which accurately transcribes 'Fenwick' and 'Acct.' compared to gpt-5-mini's 'farmer' and 'Act'.

rows.description: Mr. Robt. Haskins Acct. for Merton Estate
rows.notes: Consensus on row type and empty amounts. Description chosen from gemini-flash, which accurately transcribes 'Mr. Robt.' and 'Acct.' compared to gpt-5-mini's 'Wm. Robt.' and 'acct.'.

rows.description: from Mich. 1787 to Mich. 1788
rows.notes: Consensus on row type and empty amounts. Description chosen from gemini-flash, which accurately transcribes 'Mich.' and 'to' compared to gpt-5-mini's 'Mid.' and '&'.

rows.description: Money Rent
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description refined to 'Money Rent' (from both extractors), excluding the numeric string which represents the amount fields.

rows.description: Corn Rent
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description chosen as 'Corn Rent' from gpt-5-mini, as visual verification confirms it is correct, unlike gemini-flash's 'Lom Rent'. Numeric string excluded from description.

rows.description: Total of Years Rent
rows.notes: Consensus across all extractors for all fields, with numeric string excluded from description.

rows.description: Deductions allowed
rows.notes: Consensus across all extractors for all fields.

rows.description: Land Tax
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description refined to 'Land Tax' (from both extractors), excluding the numeric string which represents the amount fields.

rows.description: Leveretts Close
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description chosen as 'Leveretts Close' from gemini-flash, which is more accurate than gpt-5-mini's uncertain 'Levett? Close'. Numeric string excluded from description.

rows.description: Rep. Mr. House
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description chosen as 'Rep. Mr. House' from gemini-flash, as visual verification confirms 'Mr.' is correct, unlike gpt-5-mini's 'Vicar.'. Numeric string excluded from description.

rows.description: Do. of Chancel
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description determined by visual verification: 'Do.' (ditto) from gpt-5-mini is more plausible than 'Dr.' (gemini-flash) in context, and 'Chancel' (gpt-5-mini) is clearer than 'Chancey' (gemini-flash). Numeric string excluded from description.

rows.description: Total of Deductions
rows.notes: Consensus across all extractors for all fields, with numeric string excluded from description. Both extractors correctly extracted the ledger's written value despite the noted arithmetic discrepancy.

rows.description: Remains clear for the Years Rent
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts and description. Row type chosen as 'total' (gemini-flash) after visual verification, as this row represents a calculated summary ('Total of Years Rent' minus 'Total of Deductions'), not a simple entry.

rows.description: Grand Total
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts, fraction, and row type. Description 'Grand Total' (gemini-flash) chosen as a logical implied label for the final ledger total, which is visually represented by its position and line. gpt-5-mini left the description empty. Both extractors correctly extracted the ledger's written value despite the noted arithmetic discrepancy.
